purpose: Phase 2 oracle: kernel (K_8), codomain theta null point, and (input,image) pairs for individual plain dim-4 (2,2,2,2)-isogeny steps, captured from real Level-1 verifications.
note: K_8 are four 8-torsion theta points (4*K_8 is a (2,2,2,2) kernel basis). codomain_null is the standard theta null point H(O). image_pairs use IsogenyDim4.image; absent when the codomain has a zero dual theta-null coordinate (has_zero_dual).
